description_long: This is a high-ankle boot featuring a matte gray upper constructed from what appears to be a synthetic or treated leather material, with a robust lace-up system and metal eyelets for secure fastening. The lower portion of the boot is distinctly colored in blue, transitioning into a thick, rugged orange sole designed for enhanced grip and durability. The sole is lugged, providing traction suitable for urban and possibly light outdoor environments. The boot's design is utilitarian yet modern, with a slightly padded collar and a visible seam where the upper meets the sole. Subtle star-shaped markings are present on the lateral side of the heel, adding a decorative touch.
description: A modern, high-ankle boot with a matte gray upper, blue midsole, and thick orange lugged sole, featuring a lace-up front and subtle star details.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the lace-up system, rounded toe, and the transition from gray upper to blue and orange sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth gray upper, blue midsole, orange sole, and star-shaped markings near the heel.
description_view_2: Rear-left view focusing on the padded collar, heel seam, and the full thickness of the orange lugged sole.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the lace-up front, eyelets, and the color contrast between the upper and the sole.
